artifactId.description: Stable source-package artifact identity. Format: vaultui_<folder-name>_<26-char ULID>.

match.description: Developer-facing registry binding intent. Each binding pairs one chainId with one factoryAddress. Enforced token CA policy is owned by the flap.sh registry; optional binding-level tokenAddresses are reference lists only.

bindings.description: Explicit (chainId, factoryAddress) binding targets. One UI artifact can share logic across multiple deployment targets. Duplicate (chainId + factoryAddress) pairs are also blocked by vault:check.

chainId.description: EVM chain ID, for example 56 for BNB Chain mainnet or 97 for BNB Chain testnet.

factoryAddress.description: Non-zero factory contract address on this chain. Zero address is not a valid custom UI binding target.

vaultAddresses.description: Optional reference Vault address list for this binding. Omit when not needed. The template validates the addresses but preview/runtime does not use this list for matching.

tokenAddresses.description: Optional reference token CA allowlist for this binding. vault:check validates the address format only; preview/runtime does not enforce the list. Use only when a deployment needs a per-binding token reference list.

externalContracts.description: Optional review declaration for fixed contract targets that are not the runtime token, Vault, factory, or binding-scoped token/vault addresses. Each entry must include the contract address and a human-readable label.

i18n.description: Supported locale list. vault:check validates exactly these locales against i18n.json.

endpoints.description: Optional non-oracle external endpoint declarations. Use a single HTTPS URL string or an array of HTTPS URL strings for fast review/checker allowlisting.

address.description: Fixed external contract address reviewed for this binding.

label.description: Human-readable review label, for example Reward distributor.
